card.title: mazer: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
card.summary: Coordinate mobile safe-area and browser layout behavior through one viewport, text-alignment, and input-coordinate contract instead of screenshot-specific offsets.
card.objective: Keep menu, Options, play, and Pause geometry visually balanced and make the rendered touch target agree with the user's physical touch across visual-viewport origin changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared UI text uses consistent optical centering and symmetric padding without bottom-biased empty space.
Touch input remains aligned when mobile browser chrome or safe-area origin changes without a width or height change.
Phone-sized menu, Options, play, and Pause surfaces pass route-aware bounds, overlap, and console proof.
Physical iPhone and installed-PWA evidence remains required before terminal completion.
discoveries: Role-specific upward label lift and bottom-only run-status padding caused the reported asymmetric text boxes.
Phaser retained stale canvas bounds when the visual viewport moved but kept the same dimensions, so game-only touch hit-testing drifted below the finger.
nextActions: Review and merge Mazer PR #78 after code review.
After a separately authorized production deployment, collect operator physical-iPhone screenshots and touch-alignment proof.
Retain the existing installed-PWA and native browser-chrome matrix as open acceptance work.
blockers: Physical-device post-deploy proof is not available before merge and a separately authorized deployment.
evidence: Focused input/UI packet passed 6 files / 95 tests; architecture passed 5 files / 18 tests; canonical verification passed 49 files / 367 tests; production build passed.
Isolated in-app 390x844 proof reported native canvas geometry, zero viewport or overlap violations, zero console warnings/errors, and exact upper-stick hit alignment.

entry.headline: Mobile text alignment and touch-coordinate repair is ready for review
completed: Removed role-specific upward label offsets and made the two-row run-status padding symmetric.
Refreshed Phaser canvas bounds on same-size viewport publications and normalized custom gesture coordinates through the live canvas rectangle.
Completed focused, architecture, canonical, build, and 390x844 in-app browser proof.
discovered: The vertical touch error was a stale coordinate-origin defect, not a device-wide touch calibration issue.
next: Merge PR #78 after review, then obtain separately authorized production and physical-device evidence.
